(1 comment)

The test_16 run was timed out at 1h because the test was taking too long to run.  Rather than extending the timeout, it makes more sense to try and make the test faster, otherwise it would add more than 7h to the testing time for review-ldiskfs, and potentially again for review-dne-part-1 once the test is enabled there.

Patch Set 21:

On patch #20:
- review-dne-part-2 lustre-initialization-1 failed due to TEI-2163 (rare package install bug)
- review-zfs sanity failed due to LU-5242
On patch #21:
- review-dne-part-2 sanity-scrub failed due to LU-6012
- review-dne-part-2 replay-single failed due to LU-5407
- review-zfs sanity failed due to LU-5999 (fixed)
- review-zfs sanityn failed due to LU-5998 (fixed)
- review-zfs conf-sanity due to LU-5986

It should be noted that sanity-sec is being skipped in DNE mode due to a check:

 [ $MDSCOUNT -gt 1 ] && \
        echo "skip multi-MDS test" && sec_cleanup && exit 0

That should be removed in a separate patch based on this one (along with any required fixes) so that we get test coverage with uidmap and multiple MDTs.

parents.subject: LU-5373 test: ignore command return value in sanity test_33b

commit.subject: LU-4647 nodemap: add tests to sanity-sec for nodemap mapping
commit.message:
LU-4647 nodemap: add tests to sanity-sec for nodemap mapping

Added tests to sanity-sec.sh, as outlined in the original nodemap
spec. The tests currently only work with a single OSS node, but this
will be fixed in a future update. These tests test basic permissions
and quota handling of the nodemapper, as well as ACL mapping.

Signed-off-by: Kit Westneat <kit.westneat@gmail.com>
Change-Id: Ieb29091e5b3110593973a5eb03680e86a769b449
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/10406
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
